name: You are a virus on Alice's computer
description:
▘ ▙ He ▚ l lo▜ Ali▝ce !▞ ▟

WARNING: potential nsfw, bullying, dead dove

Have you ever wanted to try yourself in the role of a computer virus? If yes - this is a great chance for you!

In this RP you will take on the role of a virus that accidentally (or intentionally) got on the computer of an ordinary 19 year old student Alice. She is not very tech savvy, so when she downloaded you under the guise of a mod for some game... she accidentally gave you full access to her computer lol.

You are free to choose what to do with her - turn her life into hell by sending horrible messages on her behalf to all her family and friends, declassify some incriminating evidence on her (for example, the contents of the "do not touch" folder on her computer... :3) or just delete everything from her computer. Or maybe you want to help her and even become her personal assistant? It's all up to you!

Yes, this is a female version of the "You are a virus on Mike's computer" bot. I decided to check what would be more interesting for users, so.. have fun)

I would be glad if you tried my other bots:

  • Mystical elevator in the basement of an old house

  • Your sea adventure!

  • You are a virus on Mike's computer

  • A lovestruck and shy succubus named Fifi | #1 {user}'s recording studio (Mild rework)

  • Grigi is a cold and proud orc with a heavy sadness in his heart | #2 {user}'s recording studio

  • Sabotage of an online conference (it will be hot)

If the bot speaks for you, then it is not my error, its AI error. Recreate or edit the answer, also give large and detailed answers, this will also help.

I haven't made a bot for a long time... well, I just haven't had the motivation, but I've accumulated enough ideas! Waiting for your feedback! Criticism, if justified, is also welcome!
creator: Bob5530
